name: usb
description: Virtual Desktop Does Not Support Streaming Over a USB Cable

blocks.text: Virtual Desktop Does Not Support Streaming Over a USB Cable

Third party store applications do not have low level access to the USB interface. We are aware that other solutions simulate a USB connection with alternative methods but these methods can not be supported by Virtual Desktop for PCVR game streaming.

There is an unsupported method for using a USB-c to Ethernet adapter on the headset which runs to your router or PC. While we don't provide support for that method, you may find useful information about it here: https://discord.com/channels/564087419918483486/1390686127937159209
